text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ugh! Whyyy?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: The signal around here is just abysmal! At this rate...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
At this rate... I'll run out of time... I've been
waiting ever so patiently too... Ngh.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Rrgh! Well, I shall just have to find an area with
better reception! And you! Come help me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Judging by how desperate she seems, she must be
waiting on a really important message.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
This area is nice and open, so we should be able
to get some decent network coverage...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Agh! I don't believe it! There's no difference at all!
Any luck on your phone?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ugh! This dingus of a network! To the next area!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! That's right! When one has low signal, then surely the solution is to get higher to reach it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: "No signal"?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But why?! Surely we're closer to the satellite now
than we were before!
choice_data_list:
Satellites have nothing to do with your phone
signal, though...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Pardon?! Is the signal not broadcast from a
satellite?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that phone network signals are
distributed via base station antennas.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Why didn't you tell me that sooner?! Where's an
antenna? I'll go to the next town over to find one
if I must!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ahh... Where are you, reception?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We try out several more places in hopes of
finding a better signal, but struggle to get a
single bar anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Beachgoer A
text_block_list.text:
This giant mountain of yakisoba is totally
post-worthy!

text_block_list.name: Beachgoer B
text_block_list.text:
For sure! Let's get a vid of you eating it and send
it to everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They have enough reception to send a video?
Could this be the salvation we've been looking
for?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This must be what they mean when they say the darkest place is under the candlestick. I'd never have suspected that snack shack would have Wi-Fi.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But now I can finally... finally...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Finally watch my show!
choice_data_list: This was all so you could watch a show?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why, yes! Today's the day the latest episode of The Noble Court becomes available to watch online!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The main character is set to appear in court for
the very first time! She's been diligently preparing
for the case, and now the critical moment's finally
arrived!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It'd be devastating if the stream suddenly froze
while I was watching it! What a relief that I
actually managed to download the episode.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe we braved mountains and
coastlines solely to download an episode of a
show. Although, it does warm my heart to see
King Halo looking so happy...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Hm, excuse me? What are you grinning about?
choice_data_list:
Oh, I was just thinking that you must really love
that show.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! J-just to let you know, my frantic behavior
had nothing to do with my fondness for this
series!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It was certainly not for such a childish reason! This
was just... Uh...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Duty! It's akin to a duty!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
One who is first-rate must remain acutely aware
of popular trends!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Especially foreign TV series that are becoming a hot topic among celebrities around the world!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And besides, once I started watching, I grew
curious as to how the story would unfold.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The episodes always end on such cliffhangers, you
see. I wonder what happens after that last one...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like King Halo is desperate to watch the
next episode of her show. I shouldn't keep her.
choice_data_list: You're free to head back and watch it.
You're free to head back and watch it.
Just don't stay up all night watching it, okay?
Just don't stay up all night watching it, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like King Halo is desperate to watch the
next episode of her show. I shouldn't keep her.
choice_data_list: You're free to head back and watch it.
You're free to head back and watch it.
Just don't stay up all night watching it, okay?
Just don't stay up all night watching it, okay?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I have every intention of doing just that! In fact, you ought to—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Ah. Well, hmm. How should I put this?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You served me splendidly today! I hereby
commend your efforts!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now, relish in your joy as you get some proper
rest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After issuing her command, King Halo practically
flounces back to her room.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course I won't! Who do you take me for? It's
only a single episode, so it's quite all right! And
besides...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
As a viewer with first-rate self-control, I'd never
watch more than the set number of episodes I
decide for myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she makes this assertion, King Halo brims with
confidence in her ability to resist binging on her
show and pulling an all-nighter.
